changes.description: Implement responsive layout properties
improve: enhance wrapComponent functionality with metadata merging
Add `mockData` property to `DataSource` for development and testing
Add headerUserSelect and cellUserSelect properties to Table
Gather a search index into a json file at SSG time, which the client fetches.
Fix Table rows occasionally rendering as blank despite valid data by passing `itemSize={rowHeight}` to the virtua Virtualizer component
Add applyLayoutProperties configuration option
Fix ContextMenu and ModalDialog theming regressions
Theme variables optimization ready for review
Add dock property to Stack
Remove HoverCard and PositionedContainer
Fix Select regression
feat: integrate wrapComponent into core components where possible
Fix theme variable optimization regressions
Fix portal styling issues with ModalDialog and Search
Global variables regression fixes
fix: Links in tables can't be right-clicked
Allow sync between Table instance with syncWithVar
Made pattern validation such as email, phone and url more lenient: now they accept empty values.
Updated search functionality on website and reworked search data transformation. Also added categories for search results.
Add responsive `when-xs`, `when-sm`, `when-md`, `when-lg`, `when-xl`, `when-xxl` attributes
Fixed a bug where pressing enter after entering an input in the Search field on the website did not navigate to the first result.
fix: ensure header and data cells remain aligned during column resizing in Table component
Add responsive "when" (-xs, -sm, -md, ect.) attributes
Add the 'ssg' subcommand to xmlui
Add long text related properties to Link
Remove the EmojiSelector component

Fix `Actions.navigate` with relative paths (e.g. `'.'`) and query params now correctly stays on the current page instead of redirecting to the `Pages` fallback. The relative pathname is resolved to an absolute path before being passed to the router, because the wrapped navigate introduced in 12.4 for `willNavigate`/`didNavigate` events runs in a higher-level React context that lacked the nested route matches needed for correct relative-path resolution.
refactor: prevent auto-focus in Sheet component
refactor: update Link component to support noIndicator prop and improve footer layout on the website
Add StickySection component
Fix willNavigate and didNavigate regression
APICall now does not invalidate queries while navigating away
Remove deprecated \_meta.json files and related code. Navigation now uses navSections/ JSON files exclusively.
refactor: update layout and styling for navigation, introduce new theme vars for Drawer close button
Fix new operator parsing (priority) issue
ExpandableItem whitespace can be fully controlled via theme
Add Drawer component
Add experimental IncludeMarkup component
Inline styles on components with the bindTo property applied will not style the label. Also fixed NumberBox adornment location when writing mode is right-to-left.
Use the new website project as the target of component document generation
Fix bookmark navigation in nested apps (xmlui-pg playground examples)
Add itemWidth property to Stack and FlowLayout
Change component document generation to the new link format
Remove global variables from compnent files
Fix virtualization issues with List and Table
Fix shrinking Table selection checkbox
feat: improve NavPanel by using NavSection placeholder components for dynamic nav element generation
Fix initialPrimarySize issue with Splitter
fix: handle active heading state in TableOfContents and update indicator visibility
Fix <script> + code-behind function declaration regression
fix: enhance footer behavior in App component
fix: toc - smoothScrolling
APICall allows access to error response details
Actions.upload now allows field name
Fix Bookmark scrolling issue with xmlui-pg
Additional component metadata: "excludeBehaviors", "deprecationMessage"
Remove multiple adjacent separators from DropdownMenu and ContextMenu
fix: scroll behavior handling in TableOfContents and AppContent components
Ensure vite dev server restarts when a module changes
Fix Tree collapseNode to mark the node unloaded
Allow Tree.replaceNode to change the node ID
Improve inspector trace logging with additional event data
Global variable handling redesigned
Fix return from try..catch
Conservative refactoring of containers and state management
Removed react-icons as a dependency.
Add inspector logging infrastructure for debugging XMLUI applications
- when using `parseAs`, remember the filename(s) and report them in the input box
improve TableOfContents component
Fix Fragment visibility regression
Add module import to standalone apps
Fix <script> layout issue in App
Extend Tree API with replaceNode and replaceChildren
Experimenting with publish/subscribe behavior
Minor Splitter improvements
Add global variables to xmlui (Globals.xs)
Fix breaking component links (404) in docs
feat: implement navpanelFooter and NavPanelCollapseButton (experimental)
Fix Windows-specific module resolution issues
Fix ContextMenu regressions
Add icon to SubMenuItem
Updated FileUploadDropZone so the default styling is more user friendly.
Fix onContextMenu issues with Tree
Fixed issue with markdown links to properly download resource files.
Experiment with module imports
Tweaked ExpandableItem styles so the summary button appears interactable.
Add selectAll, cut, copy, paste, and delete actions (with keybindings) to Table
fix: labelBehavior - double label issue
